ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Name of the agency the agent belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the agent */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the agent is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the agent is based */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the agent's location */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Agent's license number */,
  "rating" REAL /* Agent's rating (e.g., 4.5 out of 5) */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales made by the agent */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings managed by the agent */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the agent joined the agency */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Agent's area of specialization (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_properties" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date the agent listed the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission percentage for the agent on this property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id", "property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the buyer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the buyer is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the buyer is based */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the buyer's location */,
  "buyer_type" TEXT /* Type of buyer (e.g., individual, company) */,
  "pre_approval_amount" REAL /* Pre-approval amount for the buyer */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the buyer's mortgage */,
  "preferred_location" TEXT /* Preferred location for the buyer */,
  "budget" REAL /* Buyer's budget range */,
  "property_type_preference" TEXT /* Preferred type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the buyer registered with the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyer_properties" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the buyer viewed the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the buyer's interest (e.g., interested, not interested) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id", "property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sold */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price the property was sold for */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who facilitated the sale */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent on this sale */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was closed */,
  "escrow_company" TEXT /* Name of the escrow company */,
  "mortgage_provider" TEXT /* Name of the mortgage provider */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "down_payment" REAL /* Down payment amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "comm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "comm_date" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  "comm_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call, message) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the communication (if applicable) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the communication (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "comm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the communication the message belongs to */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_comm_id FOREIGN KEY ("comm_id") REFERENCES communications ("comm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_notifications" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "email_date" TEXT /* Date the email was sent */,
  "email_subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_sharing" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "doc_date" TEXT /* Date the document was shared */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_sharing_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_sharing_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., pool, garden) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)
